identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a regal, high-end beauty booking experience that feels like a 5-star concierge service, not a utility app.

theme_strategy.rationale: Light mode with warm, creamy undertones conveys cleanliness, hygiene, and classic luxury suitable for high-end beauty. Dark mode is reserved for the 'Executive' tier or specific high-contrast marketing sections.

headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Use italic variants for emphasis words.

primary.name: Royal Emerald
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, strong branding elements.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)

spacing.base: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.
spacing.containers: Max-width 1400px for marketing, Full width with p-6 for dashboard.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary rounded-full px-8 py-6 hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.hover_effect: Lift up 2px, border color shifts to Gold (#C5A059).

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

navigation.style: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-white/20

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on all backgrounds to remove digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use thin 1px Gold lines to separate sections. Use serif italic numbers (1, 2, 3) for steps.

motion.page_transition: Fade in + Slide up (20px). Duration 0.6s ease-out.
motion.scroll: Parallax effect on hero images. Staggered entrance for list items.

hero_section.alt: Minimalist luxury salon interior with shelf display
hero_section.usage: Main landing page hero background or split layout image.

setup: Install fonts: Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Update tailwind.config.js with the specific colors and font families defined above.
Override Shadcn default radius to 0 or 0.25rem for a sharper, more elegant look.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons (use thin stroke width: 1.5px).
layout_rules: Do not use standard Bootstrap columns. Use the Bento Grid strategy.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA check).
Use 'gap-8' or 'gap-12' for layout spacing to create breathing room.
component_overrides: Card: Remove heavy shadows, use subtle borders.
Input: Use 'flushed' style (border-bottom only) for a cleaner look in forms.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
